# Infracodebase University

> A structured learning program for cloud engineers. Design, build,
> document, and govern infrastructure as code through a progressive
> curriculum built for real systems.

Infracodebase University is a free platform that teaches cloud
infrastructure engineering through hands-on, structured learning
paths. Built for platform engineers, DevOps engineers, cloud
architects, and engineering teams who want to learn infrastructure
as code using Terraform, AWS, Azure, and GCP.

## Pages

- [Home](https://university.infracodebase.com/): Overview of the
  learning platform, paths, and community.
- [Manifesto](https://university.infracodebase.com/manifesto): The
  principles behind the platform — why infrastructure engineers who
  build beat those who click.
- [Curriculum](https://university.infracodebase.com/curriculum):
  Full map of every module, prerequisite, and learning path.
- [Training Paths](https://university.infracodebase.com/training):
  Structured paths for beginner, intermediate, and advanced cloud
  engineers.
- [Hands-On Labs](https://university.infracodebase.com/hands-on):
  Guided labs using Terraform, AWS, Azure, GCP, and Kubernetes.
- [Cloud Infrastructure Intro](https://university.infracodebase.com/path/cloud-infrastructure-intro):
  Beginner path — IaC concepts, providers, state, first deployment.
- [Workshops](https://university.infracodebase.com/workshops): Live
  sessions with engineers on real infrastructure problems.
- [Video Library](https://university.infracodebase.com/videos):
  Engineering walkthroughs and infrastructure design sessions.
- [Events & Lectures](https://university.infracodebase.com/events):
  Weekly technical lectures, podcast episodes, and engineering
  conversations.
- [Credentials & Badges](https://university.infracodebase.com/cards):
  Verifiable credentials shareable on LinkedIn.

## Topics covered

Infrastructure as Code, Terraform, AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes,
DevOps, Platform Engineering, Cloud Architecture, GitOps, CI/CD,
Multi-cloud, Cost optimisation, Security, Reliability Engineering.

## Audience

Cloud engineers, platform engineers, DevOps engineers, SREs, cloud
architects, and engineering leads learning to manage cloud
infrastructure programmatically.

## Free to access

All learning paths and content are free. No credit card required.
